scripts.prebuild: echo 'Execute pre-build to generate ultragraph-kb.node binary' && cd native && npm run build:dev
scripts.build: node src/cli.cjs gen && cp src/vis/* ug-out/ && cp src/cli.cjs ug-out/ && cp src/mcp-server.mjs ug-out/
scripts.graph: echo 'Building Graph data' && node src/cli.cjs graph
scripts.ingest: echo 'Ingesting data into DB' && node src/cli.cjs db-ingest
scripts.rag: echo 'Performing RAG on DB' && node src/cli.cjs db-rag
scripts.traverse: echo 'Traversing the graph' && node src/cli.cjs db-traverse
